---
title: "APERO Map"
author: "Capucine LE CAM LIGIER"
date: "17/02/2025"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
---
# I. Load Required Packages

```{r global-options, include=FALSE}
# Set global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, echo=FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries for spatial data handling and visualization
packages <- c("sf", "ggplot2", "ggspatial", "rnaturalearth", "rnaturalearthdata", "dplyr", "here")
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

# II. Import and Prepare Data

```{r}
# Unzip and read the KML file containing station locations
unzip(here("data", "THALASSA_stations.kmz"), exdir = here("data"))
# List available layers to check structure of the KML file
st_layers(here("data", "doc.kml"))
# Read the relevant layer into an sf object
points_sf <- st_read(here("data", "doc.kml"), layer = "THALASSA")
# Check the Coordinate Reference System (CRS)
print(st_crs(points_sf))
```

```{r}
# Quick checks on station data
unique(points_sf$Name)
nrow(points_sf)
```

```{r}
# Download world country boundaries for background map
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
```

```{r}
# Ensure both datasets use the same coordinate system (WGS84)
points_sf <- st_transform(points_sf, crs = 4326)
world <- st_transform(world, crs = 4326)
```

# III. Filter and Clean Station Data

```{r}
# Select only relevant APERO stations for visualization
points_sf <- points_sf %>%
  filter(Name %in% c("APERO_THA_St00", "APERO_THA_St04", "APERO_THA_St20", "APERO_THA_St32", 
                     "APERO_THA_St33", "APERO_THA_St34", "APERO_THA_St_46",
                     "APERO_THA_St_55", "APERO_THA_St_66", "APERO_THA_St76"))
```

```{r}
# Remove any potential duplicates based on station name
points_sf <- points_sf %>%
  distinct(Name, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Rename station codes to simpler labels
points_sf <- points_sf %>%
  mutate(Name = recode(Name,
    "APERO_THA_St00" = "0",
    "APERO_THA_St04" = "4",
    "APERO_THA_St20" = "20",
    "APERO_THA_St32" = "32",
    "APERO_THA_St33" = "33",
    "APERO_THA_St34" = "34",
    "APERO_THA_St_46" = "46",
    "APERO_THA_St_55" = "55",
    "APERO_THA_St_66" = "66",
    "APERO_THA_St76" = "76"
  ))
```

```{r}
# Drop any 3D geometry (Z dimension) if present
selected_stations_2d <- points_sf %>%
  st_zm()
```

```{r}
# (Optional) Sort stations by coordinates
selected_stations_sorted <- selected_stations_2d %>%
  arrange(geometry)
```

```{r}
# Ensure CRS is correctly defined (EPSG:4326 = WGS84)
if (is.na(st_crs(selected_stations_2d))) {
  selected_stations_2d <- st_set_crs(selected_stations_2d, 4326)
}
st_crs(selected_stations_2d)
```

```{r}
# Create a line connecting the selected stations
line_geometry <- st_sfc(st_linestring(st_coordinates(selected_stations_2d)[, 1:2]))
line_sf <- st_sf(geometry = line_geometry) %>% 
  st_set_crs(st_crs(selected_stations_2d))
```

IV.First Map (Quick View)

```{r}
limits <- c(xmin = -25, xmax = 0, ymin = 40, ymax = 54)

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "gray80", color = "black") +
  geom_sf(data = selected_stations_2d, aes(color = Name), size = 5, shape = 16) +
  geom_sf(data = line_sf, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = selected_stations_2d, 
            aes(x = st_coordinates(geometry)[,1], y = st_coordinates(geometry)[,2], label = Name), 
            size = 3, vjust = 1.2, hjust = 2, color = "black") +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(limits["xmin"], limits["xmax"]), ylim = c(limits["ymin"], limits["ymax"])) +
  annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.3) +
  annotation_north_arrow(location = "tr", which_north = "true", style = north_arrow_fancy_orienteering) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Longitude") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Latitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "none")
```

V. Final Map

```{r}
# Ensure station order is consistent
points_sf <- points_sf %>%
  mutate(Name = factor(Name, levels = c("0", "4", "20", "32", "33", "34", "46", "55", "66", "76")))

# Re-create line with final station order
line_geometry <- st_sfc(st_linestring(st_coordinates(points_sf)[, 1:2]))
line_sf <- st_sf(geometry = line_geometry)
line_sf <- st_set_crs(line_sf, st_crs(points_sf))
```

```{r}
# Map extent for the APERO cruise
limits <- c(xmin = -23, xmax = 0, ymin = 42, ymax = 53)

# Extract coordinates for labels
points_sf_df <- points_sf %>%
  mutate(Longitude = st_coordinates(.)[,1], 
         Latitude = st_coordinates(.)[,2])

# Final map
Fig2A <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world, fill = "#cef5ff", color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  geom_sf(data = points_sf, aes(color = Name), size = 5, shape = 16) +
  geom_sf(data = line_sf, color = "grey50", size = 0.5) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(limits["xmin"], limits["xmax"]), ylim = c(limits["ymin"], limits["ymax"])) +
  annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.3) +
  annotation_north_arrow(location = "br", which_north = "true", style = north_arrow_fancy_orienteering) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Longitude") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Latitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stations") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )
```

```{r}
# Save the figure to the "output" folder
ggsave(filename = here::here("outputs", "Fig2.tiff"),
       plot = Fig2A, dpi = 300, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", device = "tiff")
```
